ReviewCheckApprovedInteractor.docs: Concrete struct implementing ReviewCheckApprovedService. All fields are private (has_stripped_fields). action:modify with methods:[] so A's empty method list enters S; the evaluator skips method comparison when A.methods is empty, avoiding the asymmetric strip_outlives false-positive that fires for action:reference (B's item seeds S with 'static bounds while C_stripped lacks them). Not modified in this track — action:modify is a workaround for evaluator asymmetry (see Open Questions).

informal_grounds.summary: action:modify workaround for evaluator asymmetric strip_outlives false-positive: action:reference with methods in B causes SMinusC_Reference_Red; action:modify with empty methods skips method comparison. Not modified in this track's scope.

TaskOperationInteractor.docs: Concrete generic struct implementing TaskOperationService. Generic over S satisfying TrackReader + TrackWriter + ImplPlanReader + ImplPlanWriter + Send + Sync. All fields are private (has_stripped_fields). action:modify with methods:[] so A's empty method list enters S; the evaluator skips method comparison when A.methods is empty, avoiding the asymmetric strip_outlives false-positive (same as ReviewCheckApprovedInteractor). Not modified in this track — action:modify is a workaround for evaluator asymmetry (see Open Questions).

informal_grounds.summary: action:modify workaround for evaluator asymmetric strip_outlives false-positive: action:reference with methods in B causes SMinusC_Reference_Red; action:modify with empty methods skips method comparison. Not modified in this track's scope.

ReviewCheckApprovedService.docs: Application service trait for the review check-approved use case. Carried for edge exposure so ReviewCheckApprovedInteractor impl edges are visible.

TaskOperationService.docs: Application service trait for track task mutation operations. Carried for edge exposure so TaskOperationInteractor impl edges are visible.
